summary: The CI job failed with exit code 1, but the provided context only shows the tail of the output and cleanup phase, lacking the actual test failure details.

evidence.reason: Confirms non-zero exit indicating job failure

suggested_fix: Provide the full test output from the job, including the section with actual test failure details and error messages, not just the tail and cleanup phase

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-14 F2 fix. The Claude shim now persists _model_info from every API call; this row predates that emit so resolved_model and usage are not recoverable. requested_model is set to the shim-level alias (haiku for v1, sonnet for v2) which is what the post-fix shim emits.
